_comment: multi-cc-im hooks template — replace ABS_PATH with the absolute path to your multi-cc-im checkout. After editing, merge the `hooks` block into ~/.claude/settings.json (cc reads from there). The 6 events are needed: SessionStart sets up paneToSession map; SessionEnd / PID checks drive PaneAlive; UserPromptSubmit / Stop carry events into bridge router; PreToolUse / PostToolUse populate events.jsonl for future analytics. See README.md Quick Start step 4 for context.
